creator: ashafer@badland.io
text:
PR for tracking update to the latest release series from the end of March.

https://www.nvidia.com/Download/driverResults.aspx/200483/en-us/

Notably with 530 enough of the patches are present in the base driver to where we can finally make a ports entry of nvidia-drm.ko. I'll wait for this update to land before sending out the nvidia-drm-*-kmod port reviews.

nvidia-drm: https://github.com/amshafer/nvidia-driver
nvidia-drm port: https://github.com/amshafer/freebsd-ports

Review: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D40168

The only infrastructure change here is that nvidia-driver now has a Makefile.version that related ports can use to reference the main driver version.
